basic_details.job_title: CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Central Fertilizer Quality Control & Training Institute (CFQCTI Faridabad)
basic_details.short_information: Central Fertilizer Quality Control & Training Institute (CFQCTI Faridabad) Junior Translator Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website https://agriwelfare.gov.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Hindi with English as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with Hindi medium and English as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with English medium and Hindi as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with Hindi and English as compulsory/elective subjects or either as medium of examination and a recognized Diploma/Certificate in translation from Hindi to English and vice versa or two years experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central or State Government office.
qualification.details: Master's degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in English with Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi medium and English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with English medium and Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi and English as compulsory or elective subjects or either of the two as a medium of examination and a recognized Diploma or Certificate course in translation from Hindi to English and vice versa or two years experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central or State Government office.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://agriwelfare.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.central_fertilizer_quality_control_train: Master's degree in Hindi with English as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in English with Hindi as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with Hindi medium and English as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with English medium and Hindi as compulsory/elective subject or medium of examination; OR Master's degree in any subject other than Hindi or English with Hindi and English as compulsory/elective subjects or either as medium of examination and a recognized Diploma/Certificate in translation from Hindi to English and vice versa or two years experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central or State Government office.

content_sections.heading: CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CFQCTI Faridabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Vacancy 2026 Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree of a recognized University in Hindi with English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in English with Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi medium and English as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with English medium and Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as the medium of examination at the degree level; OR Master's degree of a recognized University in any subject other than Hindi or English, with Hindi and English as compulsory or elective subjects or either of the two as a medium of examination and a recognized Diploma or Certificate course in translation from Hindi to English and vice versa or two years experience of translation work from Hindi to English and vice versa in Central or State Government office.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date (60 days from publication in Employment News)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://agriwelfare.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CFQCTI Faridabad Junior Translator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Translator post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in Hindi or English with specific conditions, or a Master's degree in any other subject with relevant translation experience or a diploma is required. Please refer to the detailed notification for exact criteria.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Translator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Translator post is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Translator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Translator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Translator post in the Central Fertilizer Quality Control & Training Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Junior Translator post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for the Junior Translator role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification and Bio-data Screening.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Central Fertilizer Quality Control & Training Institute (CFQCTI Faridabad).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Deputation.
